body:
# Snow's Extended Structures & Biomes
Dive into a richer, more immersive world with Snow's Extended Structures & Biomes! This mod takes your game to the next level by expanding the variety of environments and architectural marvels you can encounter. Explore beautifully crafted biomes that offer unique landscapes, each with its own distinct flora, fauna, and environmental challenges.

Features:

New Biomes: Discover diverse and intricate biomes, from frosty tundras to lush, hidden groves, each with its own set of resources and hidden secrets.
Expanded Structures: Encounter new and elaborate structures that enhance exploration and gameplay, including ancient ruins, mysterious towers, and bustling settlements.
Enhanced Environmental Interaction: Experience dynamic weather patterns and environmental effects that interact with the new biomes, adding depth and realism to your adventure.
Unique Resources & Crafting: Find new materials and crafting recipes exclusive to the extended biomes, allowing you to create unique items and gear.
## FABRIC 1.21+ AND FORGE 1.21+ COMING SOON!
